scenarios.name: SSH Port Open to Internet
scenarios.description: Security Group sg-0a1b2c3d has port 22 open to 0.0.0.0/0

remediation.description: Remove SSH (port 22) ingress rule that allows 0.0.0.0/0

scenarios.name: S3 Bucket Publicly Accessible
scenarios.description: Bucket aegis-company-data-2026 has public access enabled

remediation.description: Enable all public access block settings on the S3 bucket

scenarios.name: Database Port Exposed to Internet
scenarios.description: Security Group sg-9i8h7g6f has MySQL port 3306 open to 0.0.0.0/0

remediation.description: Remove MySQL (port 3306) ingress rule that allows 0.0.0.0/0

scenarios.name: IAM Policy with Wildcard Permissions
scenarios.description: Policy AdminWildcardAccess grants * on all resources

remediation.description: Replace wildcard (*) permissions with least-privilege scoped actions
